description: Search the unified knowledge store. Provide at least one of `lexicalQuery` or `semanticQuery`. Returns plain-text ranked results with path, title, match metadata, and snippets from summary or body.

lexicalQuery.description: Optional lexical query for exact terms, titles, paths, identifiers, or short keyword combinations.

semanticQuery.description: Optional semantic query for intent- or meaning-based retrieval using natural language.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5, max: 20).

pathPrefix.description: Optional type-prefixed path prefix such as `memory/agent/` or `reference/unity/`.
